description_long: This is a weathered bubble tea cup with a cylindrical shape, slightly tapering towards the base. The cup appears to be made of a semi-translucent plastic, stained with brownish marks, suggesting it has been discarded or left outdoors for some time. The lid is a flat, dark-colored plastic with a grid-like pattern, tightly sealed around the rim. A wide, straight red plastic straw is inserted through the center of the lid, standing upright or at a slight angle depending on the view. Faint branding or logo details in red are visible on one side of the cup, though they are partially obscured by grime. The cup's contents are not clearly visible, and there are no obvious signs of tapioca pearls at the bottom.
description: A weathered, semi-translucent bubble tea cup with a flat, patterned lid and a wide red straw, featuring faint red branding on the side.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the back, showing the stained plastic surface and the straight red straw centered in the lid.
description_view_1: The front view reveals faint red branding or logo on the cup, with the straw angled slightly to the right.
description_view_2: The cup is viewed from the opposite side, with the straw upright and the stained surface more prominent.
description_view_3: The cup is seen from a diagonal front angle, showing both the red branding and the angled straw.
attribute_straw_type: wide, straight, red plastic straw with no visible pattern or pointed tip
attribute_cup_lid_style: flat, dark plastic lid with a grid-like pattern and a central straw slot
attribute_cup_branding_or_logo: faint red logo or text on the front side of the cup, partially obscured by stains
